productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarfly+2 Grey Sports Shoes
description: The nike LunarFly+ 2 gives a stable ride and plush cushioning along with a better Fit, enhanced support and a bolder, more modern look. The nike Lunarfly+ 2 running shoe has a more robust heel counter than its predecessor for an improved fit around the heel. Inside the breathable mesh upper is an innersleeve, or bootie, that wraps around the foot for a snug, breathable feel and easy on and off. Soft meets springy - the Lunarlon cushioning system is made up of a soft yet resilient foam core encased within a supportive foam carrier for a unique, lightweight blend of ultra-plush cushioning, springy response and support. The midsole of this running shoe features Dynamic Support, which adapts to your stride throughout each run to provide just the right amount of support. Best for underpronated to mildly overpronated gait types. Upper Mesh uppers for great breathability with suede overlays around the midfoot to give enhanced support Reflectivity on the toe and heel for enhanced visibility in low light Lace-up system for customised snug fit Cushioned mesh collar and tongue Removable Fitsole for fit, cushioning and support Midsole Lunarlon cushioning for soft yet responsive shock absorption – 30% lighter than the traditional Phylon Outsole Outsole flex grooves for enhanced flexibility and a smooth, efficient stride A mix of rubbers in a Waffle pattern on the outsole for durability and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
